---
title: "Result of Testing Fixation for Overnight Staining of PBMCs"
author: "Cyrus Martinian"
date: 2026-7-08
toc: TRUE
theme: darkly
---

# Wash of Overnight Stained Samples

1 mL of PBS was added to all samples, which were then centrifuged at 300 xg for 5 minutes. Supernatent was discarded and samples were resuspended in 180 uL of PBS. 

5 uL of 7-AAD viability dye was added to the fixed & unfixed overnight backbone stains, these were placed in the fridge to incubate for 5 minutes. 

# Result of Fixed & Unfixed Backbone Stain on PBMCs



# Result of unfixed single color stains on PBMCs
